title: Senior Doctor - SRL Diagnostics - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - SRL Diagnostics - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!
